description: Private mirror dry-run artifact for GrantLayer developer-preview public release candidate. Validates clean snapshot procedure locally without any GitHub publication, API calls, remote changes, or history rewrite.
dry_run_validation_checklist: Run scripts/public-secret-sensitive-scan.sh against snapshot tree — must exit 0
Confirm GL-157 scan gate validation tests pass
Confirm GL-158 history exposure review tests pass
Confirm GL-156 issue template tests pass
Confirm GL-155 agent examples tests pass
Run full backend suite or document deferral with reason
Verify LICENSE Apache-2.0 present in snapshot
Verify README.md with required caveats present in snapshot
Verify CONTRIBUTING.md present in snapshot
Verify SECURITY.md with required caveats present in snapshot
Verify AGENTS.md present in snapshot
Verify llms.txt present in snapshot
Verify docs/ non-empty in snapshot
Verify examples/ present in snapshot
Verify sdk/python/ present in snapshot
Verify .github issue templates and PR template present in snapshot
Verify .claude/ is NOT present in snapshot
Verify .git/ is NOT present in snapshot
Verify no private hostnames in snapshot tree
Verify no internal absolute paths in snapshot tree
Verify no GitHub remote set (git remote -v)
Verify no accidental git push to GitHub occurred
Verify no GitHub API was called
Verify no history rewrite was performed
excluded_contents: .git/ (full internal git history — not published per GL-158 decision)
private hostnames (internal service URLs and homelab addresses)
internal absolute paths (developer home directories and mount paths)
real secrets (no real production credentials, API keys, or tokens)
real customer data (no real grant applicants, customer records, or personal data)
private personal data (no passport numbers, SSNs, national IDs, or bank account data)
internal git remote configuration (private Forgejo remote references)
gl160_go_no_go_inputs: GL-159 dry-run result: pass or fail
Scan gate exit code on snapshot tree (must be 0)
Expected file set confirmed present in snapshot
No private hostnames in snapshot confirmed
Full backend suite result (pass or documented deferral)
Public repo metadata confirmed (name, description, topics, visibility, default branch)
README and SECURITY caveats verified in final snapshot
